title: Checkout: place order
query: What happens when a user clicks Place Order?

steps.title: UI click handler
steps.note: User clicks Place Order; client validates the cart id then POSTs to the API.

steps.title: HTTP route entry
steps.note: API route receives the request and delegates to createOrder.

steps.title: Create order service
steps.note: Parses body, loads cart, persists order row, returns the order DTO.

steps.title: Persist order
steps.note: Database insert for the new order; end of the happy path.

steps.title: Unauthorized response
steps.note: Branch: missing/invalid session returns 401 without calling createOrder.

steps.title: Validation failure
steps.note: Branch: schema parse failure maps to a 400 response.
